title: cirsium × sabaudum
intro: Cirsium × sabaudum, also known as the globe thistle, is a hybrid plant species in the sunflower family, resulting from the cross between Cirsium echinatum and Cirsium vulgare. The globe thistle has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Cirsium × sabaudum include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant properties. Globe thistle can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
